name: pixelpivot-sharp-daemon
description: Sharp daemon for PixelPivot Batch Engine

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm start" "cd ../.. && uv run python -m uvicorn app.batch_api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "cd ../.. && uv run --extra gui python -m streamlit run app/web/batch_gui/main.py --server.port 8503"
